name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Helper: maximum ticket among all processes *)
maxTicket(t) == IF t = {} THEN 0 ELSE Max(t)

(* Helper: set of all process indices *)
procSet == 1..N

(* Helper: set of tickets of all processes except i *)
otherTickets(i, t) == { t[j] : j \in procSet \ {i} }

(* Helper: set of processes with lower priority than i *)
lowerPriority(i, t) == { j \in procSet : t[j] < t[i] \/ (t[j] = t[i] /\ j < i) }

(* Helper: set of processes that are in the critical section *)
inCritical(t, s) == { i \in procSet : s[i] = Critical }

(* Helper: set of processes that are in the trying state *)
inTrying(t, s) == { i \in procSet : s[i] = Trying }

(* Helper: set of processes that are in the idle state *)
inIdle(t, s) == { i \in procSet : s[i] = Idle }

(* Helper: set of processes that are in the critical section or trying *)
inCSorTrying(t, s) == inCritical(t, s) \cup inTrying(t, s)

(* Helper: set of processes that are in the critical section or idle *)
inCSorIdle(t, s) == inCritical(t, s) \cup inIdle(t, s)

(* Helper: set of processes that are in the critical section or idle or trying *)
inCSorIdleorTrying(t, s) == inCritical(t, s) \cup inIdle(t, s) \cup inTrying(t, s)

(* Helper: set of all processes *)
AllProc == 1..N

VARIABLE ticket, state, process

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no tickets *)
Init == ticket = [i \in AllProc |-> 0] /\ state = [i \in AllProc |-> Idle]

(* Entry protocol: acquire ticket and wait until it is this process's turn *)
Entry(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = Idle
  /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![i] = Max(ticket) + 1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Trying]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ticket, state>>

(* Exit protocol: release ticket and reset state *)
Exit(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = Critical
  /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Idle]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ticket, state>>

(* Condition for entering critical section: this process has the lowest ticket *)
CanEnter(i) ==
  \A j \in AllProc : j # i => ticket[i] <= ticket[j]

(* Next-state relation: any process can enter or exit *)
Next ==
  \E i \in AllProc :
    (Entry(i) /\ CanEnter(i)) \/ Exit(i)

(* Specification: initial state and next-state relation *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ticket, state>>

(* Invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in AllProc : (state[i] = Critical /\ state[j] = Critical) => i = j

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, state, msgs

(* Participant states: "init", "prepared", "committed", "aborted" *)
Init == participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "init"] /\
           state = "coordinator" /\ msgs = <<>>

Prepare(i) == /\ state = "coordinator"
             /\ msgs' = Append(msgs, <<"Prepare", i>>)

VoteYes(i) == /\ participants[i] = "prepared"
              /\ msgs' = Append(msgs, <<"VoteYes", i>>)

VoteNo(i) == /\ participants[i] = "prepared"
             /\ msgs' = Append(msgs, <<"VoteNo", i>>)

Commit == /\ state = "coordinator"
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "prepared"
          /\ msgs' = Append(msgs, <<"Commit">>)

Abort == /\ state = "coordinator"
         /\ \E i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "prepared"
         /\ msgs' = Append(msgs, <<"Abort">>)

ParticipantStep(i) ==
  CASE
    /\ \E m \in msgs: m[1] = "Prepare" /\ m[2] = i
    -> participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "prepared"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, msgs>>
  [] /\ \E m \in msgs: m[1] = "Commit"
    -> participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, msgs>>
  [] /\ \E m \in msgs: m[1] = "Abort"
    -> participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, msgs>>
  [] UNCHANGED <<participants, state, msgs>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N: ParticipantStep(i) \/ Prepare(i) \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, state, msgs>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Define philosophers and forks as the set {1, 2, ..., N} *)
Philosophers == 1..N
Forks == 1..N

(* Helper functions to get left and right forks for a philosopher *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES state, forks

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" for each philosopher *)
State == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Predicate that checks if a philosopher can eat (both forks are free) *)
CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = "free" /\ forks[RightFork(i)] = "free"

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking and all forks are free *)
Init == /\ state \in [Philosophers -> State]
        /\ forks \in [Forks -> {"free"}]

(* Action for a philosopher starting to eat *)
StartEating(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = @ + "eating"]
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = @ + "used",
                      ![RightFork(i)] = @ + "used"]

(* Action for a philosopher finishing eating *)
FinishEating(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = @ + "thinking"]
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = @ + "free",
                      ![RightFork(i)] = @ + "free"]

(* Action for a philosopher becoming hungry *)
BecomeHungry(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = @ + "hungry"]
  /\ forks' = forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can start eating, finish eating, or become hungry *)
Next ==
  \E i \in Philosophers :
    StartEating(i) \/ FinishEating(i) \/ BecomeHungry(i)

(* Invariant that no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
NoTwoAdjacentEating ==
  \A i \in Philosophers :
    ~(state[i] = "eating" /\ state[IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1] = "eating")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

(* Type correctness checks *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [Philosophers -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
  /\ forks \in [Forks -> {"free", "used"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N \* number of processes, N >= 1, N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i, 0 means no ticket *)
(* flag[i] = TRUE means process i is choosing a ticket *)

NumInv == /\ num \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Choose(i) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(Seq(1..N)) + 1]

Assign(i) ==
  LET others == {j \in 1..N : j # i}
      maxNum == Max({num[j] : j \in others})
  IN /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Enter(i) ==
  \E j \in 1..N :
    /\ j # i
    /\ num[j] > 0
    /\ num[j] < num[i]
    /\ num[j] <= num[i]

Leave(i) == num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ Choose(i)
    \/ Assign(i)
    \/ (Enter(i) /\ Leave(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == NumInv

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, holding the buffer contents.
   head and tail are indices into q (0..K-1) indicating the
   positions of the next element to consume and the next free
   slot for production, respectively.  size is the number of
   elements currently in the buffer. *)

Init == /\ q = <<>> \/ (Len(q) = K /\ q \in Seq(1..K))
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: if the buffer is not full, write a new
   element at position tail and advance tail. *)
Produce ==
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Subst(q, tail, 1)   (* write a dummy value 1 *)
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: if the buffer is not empty, read the element
   at position head and advance head. *)
Consume ==
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED tail /\ UNCHANGED q

Next == Produce \/ Consume

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

(* Invariant: size is always between 0 and K. *)
TypeOK == 0 <= size /\ size <= K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* number of servers, NULL

(* Server identifiers *)
Servers == 1..N

(* Majority threshold *)
Majority == (N \div 2) + 1

(* Server states *)
State == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* Initial state: all servers are followers with term 0 and no votes *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = [s \in Servers |-> 0]
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

(* Helper: a server is up-to-date if its term is at least the given term *)
UpToDate(term, s) == currentTerm[s] >= term

(* RequestVote RPC: candidate s requests vote from server r *)
RequestVote(s, r) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
  /\ currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[r] + 1
  /\ (votedFor[r] = NULL \/ votedFor[r] = s)
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![r] = s]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Vote granted by server r to candidate s *)
VoteGranted(s, r) ==
  /\ state[r] = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[r] + 1
  /\ votedFor[r] = NULL
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![r] = s]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Leader election: a candidate becomes leader if it receives majority votes *)
BecomeLeader(s) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
  /\ \E votes \in SUBSET Servers :
        /\ votes \subseteq {r \in Servers : votedFor[r] = s}
        /\ Cardinality(votes) >= Majority
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Follower steps down if it sees a higher term *)
StepDown(r) ==
  /\ state[r] = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm[r] < currentTerm[r]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![r] = "Follower"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Next-state relation: any server may send a RequestVote or grant a vote *)
Next ==
  \E s \in Servers :
    \E r \in Servers :
      RequestVote(s, r) \/ VoteGranted(s, r) \/ BecomeLeader(s) \/ StepDown(r)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Invariant: at most one leader per term *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in [Servers -> Nat]
           /\ votedFor \in [Servers -> (Servers \cup {NULL})]
           /\ state \in [Servers -> State]

(* Invariant: at most one leader per term *)
UniqueLeader ==
  \A t \in Nat :
    Cardinality({s \in Servers : state[s] = "Leader" /\ currentTerm[s] = t}) <= 1

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N



VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader actions *)
ReaderEnter == /\ readers' = readers + 1
               /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReaderExit == /\ readers' = readers - 1
              /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Writer actions *)
WriterEnter == /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriterExit == /\ writer_active' = FALSE
               /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ ReaderEnter
        \/ ReaderExit
        \/ WriterEnter
        \/ WriterExit

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

(* Invariant: no reader and writer simultaneously *)
TypeOK == (writer_active => readers = 0)

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan, NULL

(* Each process has a unique identifier in Proc *)
(* Chan is the set of directed channels (p,q) where p,q in Proc *)

(* State of each process: a local counter *)
VARIABLES state, chanState, recChan, recProc, snapshot

(* State of each channel: sequence of messages in transit *)

(* Snapshot state: map from process to recorded local state, and
   map from channel to recorded channel state *)

(* Auxiliary: set of processes that have recorded their state *)
recSet == DOMAIN recProc

(* Initial state: all counters zero, channels empty, no snapshot *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ chanState = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ snapshot = <<>>
        /\ recProc = [p \in Proc |-> NULL]
        /\ recChan = [c \in Chan |-> NULL]

(* Sending a message: increment local counter and append to channel *)
Send(p, q, m) ==
  /\ state[p] = state[p] + 1
  /\ chanState[(p, q)] = Append(chanState[(p, q)], m)

(* Receiving a message: remove from channel if non-empty *)
Recv(p, q) ==
  LET c == (p, q) IN
  /\ chanState[c] # <<>>
  /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = SubSeq(chanState[c], 1, Len(chanState[c]))]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, snapshot, recProc, recChan>>

(* Marker send: after recording state, send marker on all outgoing channels *)
MarkerSend(p) ==
  /\ recProc[p] # NULL
  /\ \A q \in Proc : q # p => chanState[(p, q)] = Append(chanState[(p, q)], "marker")

(* Marker receive: if not yet recorded, record state and mark channel as empty *)
MarkerRecv(p, q) ==
  LET c == (q, p) IN
  /\ recProc[p] = NULL
  /\ chanState[c] = <<>>
  /\ recProc' = [recProc EXCEPT ![p] = state[p]]
  /\ recChan' = [recChan EXCEPT ![c] = <<>>]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, chanState, snapshot>>

(* Normal message receive when already recorded *)
NormalRecv(p, q) ==
  LET c == (q, p) IN
  /\ recProc[p] # NULL
  /\ chanState[c] # <<>>
  /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = SubSeq(chanState[c], 1, Len(chanState[c]))]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recProc, snapshot, recChan>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \E p, q \in Proc :
    /\ p # q
    /\ \E m \in {"msg"} : Send(p, q, m)
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc :
    /\ p # q
    /\ Recv(p, q)
  \/ \E p \in Proc :
    /\ recProc[p] = NULL
    /\ MarkerSend(p)
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc :
    /\ p # q
    /\ MarkerRecv(p, q)
  \/ \E p, q \in Proc :
    /\ p # q
    /\ NormalRecv(p, q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, chanState, recProc, recChan>>

(* Invariant: no message lost or duplicated *)
TypeOK == /\ RecSet \subseteq Proc
          /\ \A p \in Proc : state[p] \in Nat
          /\ \A c \in Chan : chanState[c] \in Seq({"msg")

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES token, sent

(* token: 1..N, the node currently holding the token
   sent: set of nodes that have sent a message in the current round *)

TypeOK == token \in 1..N /\ sent \subseteq 1..N

Init == token = 1 /\ sent = {}

Next ==
  /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
  /\ sent' = IF token' \in sent THEN sent ELSE sent \cup {token'}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

(* State: a partial function from Keys to Values *)
VARIABLES store

(* Invariant: store is a partial function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Operations *)
Put(k, v) ==
  /\ k \in Keys
  /\ v \in Values
  /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Get(k) ==
  /\ k \in Keys
  /\ store' = store

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v) \/ Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NONE

(* Ballot numbers are natural numbers *)
Ballot == Nat

(* State of each acceptor: (promised, accepted) *)
State == [promised: Ballot, accepted: [value -> V, ballot -> Ballot] \cup {none}]

(* Global state *)
VARIABLES acceptors, proposals, decided, b

(* Initial state: all acceptors have promised 0, no value accepted, no proposals, undecided *)
Init ==
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised |-> 0, accepted |-> [value |-> NONE, ballot |-> 0]]]
  /\ proposals = [p \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NONE]]
  /\ decided = FALSE

(* Proposer chooses a new proposal with higher ballot *)
Propose(p, v) ==
  LET b == CHOOSE b' \in Ballot : b' > proposals[p].ballt IN
  /\ proposals' = [proposals EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, decided>>

(* Prepare phase: proposer sends prepare to all acceptors *)
Prepare(p) ==
  LET b == proposals[p].ballot IN
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF acceptors[i].promised < b
                                 THEN [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.promised = b]

  /\ UNCHANGED <<proposals, decided>>

(* Accept phase: proposer sends accept to all acceptors *)
Accept(p) ==
  LET b == proposals[p].ballot IN
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF acceptors[i].promised = b
                                 THEN [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.accepted = [value |-> proposals[p].value, ballot |-> b]]

  /\ UNCHANGED <<proposals, decided>>

(* Decision: if all acceptors have accepted the same value, decision is made *)
Decision ==
  LET vals == {a.accepted.value : a \in SUBSET acceptors} IN
  /\ decided' = (Cardinality(vals) = 1)
  /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposals>>

Next ==
  \E p \in 1..M : Propose(p, CHOOSE v \in V : TRUE)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : Prepare(p)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : Accept(p)
  \/ Decision

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposals, decided>>

(* Invariant: once decided, the value never changes *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> State]
  /\ proposals \in [1..M -> [ballot -> Nat, value -> V]]
  /\ decided \in BOOLEAN

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

(* File is a sequence of chunks; each chunk is a natural number. *)
CHUNKS == 1..Len(File)

VARIABLES sent, acked, retrans, lost

(* sent: set of chunks that have been sent at least once
   acked: set of chunks that have been acknowledged
   retrans: mapping from chunk to number of retransmissions attempted
   lost: set of chunks currently considered lost (not yet acknowledged) *)

Init == /\ sent = {}
        /\ acked = {}
        /\ retrans = [c \in CHUNKS |-> 0]
        /\ lost = {}

Send(c) == /\ c \in CHUNKS
           /\ ~(c \in sent)
           /\ sent' = sent \cup {c}
           /\ retrans' = [retrans EXCEPT ![c] = 0]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<acked, lost>>

Ack(c) == /\ c \in sent
          /\ ~(c \in acked)
          /\ acked' = acked \cup {c}
          /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retrans, lost>>

Retransmit(c) == /\ c \in sent
                 /\ ~(c \in acked)
                 /\ retrans[c] < MAX_RETRIES
                 /\ retrans' = [retrans EXCEPT ![c] = @ + 1]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, lost>>

Drop(c) == /\ c \in sent
           /\ ~(c \in acked)
           /\ lost' = lost \cup {c}
           /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, retrans>>

Next == \E c \in CHUNKS :
          (Send(c) \/ Ack(c) \/ Retransmit(c) \/ Drop(c))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retrans, lost>>

====
